description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Qt6 that triggers on push events to any branch except README.md, LICENSE, and BUILD.md, on pull requests to any branch except README.md, LICENSE, and BUILD.md, and on published releases. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build the project with Qt 6.5.1 on Windows x64 with Release and RelWithDebInfo configurations. It checks out the repository, installs Python 3.9, restores submodules, installs the MSVC compiler, caches Qt, installs Qt, generates dependencies, builds the project, packages the artifact, uploads it as an artifact, and uploads it to a release if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
